title: Create Advanced Projekt
description: A fun Create Modpack with cool Maschins
body:
Create Advanced – The Ultimate Create Experience!

This modpack expands the Create mod with new machines, decorations, and transportation options. With mods like Create: Steam 'n' Rails, Create Crafts & Additions, Create Deco, and many more, you can build even bigger and more complex contraptions.

Discover new automation possibilities, enhance your transport systems with trains and ships, and enjoy improved performance with FerriteCore and Dynamic FPS. Additional mods like Just Enough Items and CosmeticArmours provide better usability and customization.

Runs on Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge) and supports both singleplayer and multiplayer. Perfect for those who want to take Create to the next level!
